title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 351.710 - Penalty for refusal to exhibit books and records
text:
351.710.  Penalty for refusal to exhibit books and records. — If any officer, or agent, of any such corporation shall refuse the demand of the secretary of state, or supervisor of corporations, to exhibit the books and records of such corporation for examination, he, or they, shall be deemed guilty of a misdemeanor and upon conviction thereof punished as in this chapter provided.
(RSMo 1939 § 5104, A.L. 1943 p. 410 § 127) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 4632; 1919 § 9826
